assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly outlines separate upgrade strategies for L4 and A100 pools, with Phase 1 for L4 inference pool and Phase 2 for A100 pool with different approaches

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response creates a new node pool and manually drains old nodes rather than using surge upgrade parameters like maxSurge

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver compatibility or testing with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response includes checking for running fine-tuning jobs and coordinating with ML team on training schedules, plus migration during low training job periods

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that GPU VMs do not support live migration or that inference pods will restart

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PodDisruptionBudget configuration with minAvailable: 80% for inference services

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the interaction between auto-scaler and upgrade process or that new auto-scaled nodes will be at old version

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: While response mentions testing in Week 1, it does not specifically address driver + CUDA compatibility testing in staging
